title: 5 Stocks to Watch From the Prospering Securities and Exchanges Industry
text: Product innovation, increased market volatility and a strategic economic market model are expected to aid Securities and Exchanges stocks like CME, ICE, CBOE, NDAQ, and COIN. However, compliance with regulations remains a challenge.

title: Cboe Global Markets Receives Approval for Clearing Margined Digital Asset Futures
text: CHICAGO, IL / ACCESSWIRE / July 27, 2023 / As regulatory scrutiny intensifies in the cryptocurrency industry, Cboe Global Markets (BATS:CBOE) has secured a significant milestone by obtaining government approval for clearing margined digital asset futures. The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has granted an amended order of registration to Cboe Clear Digital, allowing the clearing organization to provide clearing services for futures on digital assets to futures commission merchants.

title: Will CBOE (CBOE) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: CBOE (CBOE) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Cboe Global Markets Furthers 50th Anniversary Charitable Giving Commitment With $100,000 Donation to World Central Kitchen
text: CHICAGO , July 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), the world's leading derivatives and securities exchange network, today announced a donation of $100,000 to World Central Kitchen, a nonprofit focused on being first to the frontlines and providing meals to people recovering from crises. The donation to World Central Kitchen is the fourth installment of Cboe's $500,000 charitable giving campaign in honor of its 50th anniversary.

title: McKay Brothers Distributes Cboe UK Cash Equities at LSE at Lowest Known Latency
text: LONDON & GENEVA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--McKay Brothers International SA (MBI) launched its newest lowest known latency market data service, distributing Cboe UK cash equities raw data at the London Stock Exchange via its wireless QRD service. Cboe UK equities data is sourced at Slough-LD4 and distributed at the LSE's Telehouse North 2 data center. The QRD service distributes the full Cboe UK CXE and BXE feeds in their native exchange format. “We are thrilled to offer traders the fastest Cboe UK cash.

title: Cboe Global Markets Promotes Jill Griebenow to Chief Financial Officer
text: Jill Griebenow, Senior Vice President, Chief Accounting Officer, appointed to serve as Executive Vice President, CFO, Treasurer and Chief Accounting Officer effective July 10, 2023 Current CFO Brian Schell departing company to pursue new opportunity CHICAGO , July 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), the world's leading derivatives and securities exchange network, today announced the promotion of Jill Griebenow to Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer, replacing Brian Schell who will be departing the company to pursue a new professional opportunity outside of the exchange industry. Griebenow will assume the new role beginning July 10, 2023, after working alongside Schell for the past 12 years.

title: 3 Stocks to Watch as Crypto Promises a July Rally
text: CME, NVDA and SHOP are three stocks that should be tracked as cryptocurrency starts off July on a positive note.
